description:
You are a compliance officer performing a very quick spot-check on yesterday’s
    application logs.  
    A single log file has already been placed on the machine for you at

        /home/user/logs/app_2023-09-15.log

    Your job is to:
    1. Count how many lines in that file contain the literal text “[ERROR]”.
    2. Record the result in a tiny “audit summary” that the automated test suite
       will read.

    Required output:

        • Create the directory /home/user/compliance               (if it does not yet exist).
        • Inside that directory create a *new* file named
              /home/user/compliance/audit_2023-09-15.txt
        • The file **must contain exactly two lines** (no blank lines anywhere),
          spelled and capitalised exactly as shown below, including the trailing
          newline at the end of the second line:

              DATE=2023-09-15
              TOTAL_ERROR_LINES=<N>

          where <N> is the number of “[ERROR]” lines you found in
          /home/user/logs/app_2023-09-15.log.

    Notes & constraints:

      • Do not modify the original log file.
      • Avoid creating any extra files in /home/user/compliance (the test checks
        that only audit_2023-09-15.txt exists there).
      • The task is intentionally simple; the whole job can be done in two or
        three shell commands (e.g., using grep, wc, etc.).  
        Feel free to accomplish it in whatever way you prefer as long as the
        final output file exactly matches the required format.
truth:
<!--
        The log file that already exists on disk before the agent starts:
    -->
    <log file="/home/user/logs/app_2023-09-15.log"><![CDATA[
2023-09-15 09:01:02 [INFO] Startup complete
2023-09-15 09:05:33 [ERROR] Failed to connect to database
2023-09-15 09:06:01 [ERROR] Authentication service unavailable
2023-09-15 09:10:45 [WARN] High memory usage detected
2023-09-15 09:15:12 [ERROR] Disk write failure
2023-09-15 09:25:37 [ERROR] Network timeout
2023-09-15 09:40:22 [INFO] Scheduled job started
2023-09-15 09:45:02 [ERROR] Cache synchronization failed
2023-09-15 10:00:15 [ERROR] Unexpected null pointer exception
2023-09-15 10:30:00 [INFO] Daily rotation complete
2023-09-15 10:45:23 [ERROR] Backup process interrupted
]]></log>

    <!--
        Ground-truth the grader will look for after the agent finishes:
    -->
    <expected file="/home/user/compliance/audit_2023-09-15.txt"><![CDATA[
DATE=2023-09-15
TOTAL_ERROR_LINES=7
]]></expected>
